evaluation_questions.question: Who are the authors of paper W1775749144?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper {id: 'W1775749144'})-[:AUTHORED]->(a:Author) RETURN a.name
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The paper W1775749144 is authored by four researchers: OliverH. Lowry, NiraJ. Rosebrough, A. Farr, and RoseJ. Randall. This is the famous paper on protein measurement with the Folin phenol reagent, a widely cited work in analytical biochemistry.

evaluation_questions.question: What papers has Kaiming He authored?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (a:Author {name: 'Kaiming He'})<-[:AUTHORED]-(p:Paper) RETURN p.id, p.title

expected_result.title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition

expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Kaiming He has authored several influential papers in computer vision and deep learning, with his most notable work being 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (W2194775991). This paper introduced ResNet architecture, which solved the vanishing gradient problem in deep networks through skip connections and has become one of the most influential papers in deep learning.

evaluation_questions.question: How many citations does paper W2100837269 have?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper {id: 'W2100837269'}) RETURN p.citation_count
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Paper W2100837269 has 229,636 citations. This is Ulrich K. Laemmli's seminal paper on 'Cleavage of Structural Proteins during the Assembly of the Head of Bacteriophage T4', which introduced the widely used SDS-PAGE protein separation technique. The high citation count reflects its fundamental importance in molecular biology and biochemistry research.

evaluation_questions.question: Which papers cite W2128635872?

expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Paper W2128635872, which describes the Bradford protein assay method for protein quantification, has been cited by numerous papers in biochemistry, molecular biology, and related fields. evaluation_questions.question: What are the most cited cancer research papers published in high-impact journals?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name IN ['CA: A Cancer Journal for Clinicians', 'Nature', 'Cell'] AND p.citation_count > 1000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: High-impact cancer epidemiology and oncology research
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include highly influential cancer research papers published in top-tier medical journals. These papers typically focus on cancer epidemiology, global cancer statistics, and major reviews that significantly influence cancer research and clinical practice worldwide.

evaluation_questions.question: Find structural biology papers about membrane proteins with more than 500 citations

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 500 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly cited structural biology papers on membrane proteins
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Structural biology papers about membrane proteins with high citation counts typically describe breakthrough methods for protein purification, crystallization, and structure determination. These studies are crucial for understanding membrane protein function and developing therapeutics, as membrane proteins represent a significant portion of drug targets.

evaluation_questions.question: Find deep learning papers in computer vision with high citation impact

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 10000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'deep' OR p.title CONTAINS 'ResNet') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly cited deep learning papers in computer vision
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include breakthrough papers in deep learning for computer vision, particularly the ResNet architecture which solved the vanishing gradient problem and enabled training of very deep networks, fundamentally advancing the field of computer vision.

evaluation_questions.question: Find cancer epidemiology papers published in high-impact medical journals

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name IN ['CA: A Cancer Journal for Clinicians', 'The Lancet Oncology'] AND p.citation_count > 1000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: High-impact cancer epidemiology research in premier medical journals
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include influential cancer epidemiology papers published in top-tier medical journals, providing comprehensive analyses of global cancer burden and epidemiological patterns that guide cancer research and public health policy.

evaluation_questions.question: Find research methodology papers that have shaped evidence-based medicine

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 5000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'PRISMA' OR p.title CONTAINS 'CONSORT') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Foundational methodology papers that shaped evidence-based medicine
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include the most influential methodology papers in evidence-based medicine, including PRISMA guidelines for systematic reviews and CONSORT statement for clinical trials, which have fundamentally improved medical research quality and transparency.

evaluation_questions.question: Find computational physics papers with high citation impact in materials science journals

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name CONTAINS 'Physical Review' AND p.citation_count > 1000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly cited computational physics papers in Physical Review journals
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include foundational computational physics papers that have significantly impacted materials science. These include ab initio calculation methods and density functional theory approaches that are widely used in the computational materials science community.

evaluation_questions.question: What research methodology papers have been highly cited in medical journals?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name IN ['BMJ', 'JAMA', 'Annals of Internal Medicine'] AND p.citation_count > 1000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly cited methodology papers like PRISMA and CONSORT guidelines
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include some of the most influential papers in medical research methodology, including the PRISMA statement for systematic reviews and the CONSORT guidelines for clinical trials. These methodological frameworks have been widely adopted and have significantly improved the quality of medical research reporting.

evaluation_questions.question: Find molecular biology and cloning papers with high methodological impact

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 5000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'molecular' OR p.title CONTAINS 'cloning' OR p.title CONTAINS 'PCR') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Foundational molecular biology methodology papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include fundamental methodology papers in molecular biology, including molecular cloning techniques, quantitative PCR analysis methods, and research methodologies that have become standard tools in molecular biology laboratories worldwide.

evaluation_questions.question: What are the most cited deep learning papers in computer vision and AI?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 10000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'deep' OR p.title CONTAINS 'neural' OR p.title CONTAINS 'ResNet') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly influential deep learning and computer vision papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include some of the most influential papers in deep learning and computer vision, particularly the ResNet architecture which solved the vanishing gradient problem and enabled training of very deep networks. These papers have fundamentally shaped modern AI and computer vision research.

evaluation_questions.question: Find plasma physics and fusion research papers published in specialized physics journals

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name CONTAINS 'Plasma' OR v.name CONTAINS 'Fusion' RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: Specialized plasma physics and fusion research papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include research on plasma physics and fusion technology, including work on radiation-resistant monitoring systems for plasma devices and fundamental studies in magnetic confinement fusion research.

evaluation_questions.question: What research methodology papers have been highly cited in psychology and social sciences?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 5000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'thematic' OR p.title CONTAINS 'qualitative' OR p.title CONTAINS 'methodology') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly influential methodology papers in psychology and social sciences
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include foundational methodology papers in psychology and social sciences, particularly on thematic analysis for qualitative research and systematic review methodologies that have shaped research practices across multiple disciplines.

evaluation_questions.question: Find high-throughput sequencing analysis papers published in bioinformatics journals

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name CONTAINS 'Bioinformatics' AND (p.title CONTAINS 'HTSeq' OR p.title CONTAINS 'sequencing') RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: Sequencing analysis methodology papers in bioinformatics journals
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include important tools for high-throughput sequencing data analysis, such as HTSeq for counting reads and quantitative methods for gene expression analysis, which are essential for modern genomics and transcriptomics research.

evaluation_questions.question: What are the most cited protein analysis papers published in biochemistry journals?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name CONTAINS 'Biochemistry' AND p.citation_count > 50000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Foundational protein analysis methodology papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include some of the most fundamental papers in protein biochemistry, including the Lowry protein assay, Laemmli's SDS-PAGE method, and the Bradford protein assay. These techniques have become essential tools in biochemistry and molecular biology laboratories worldwide.

evaluation_questions.question: Find molecular biology methodology papers with high citation impact

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 10000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'molecular' OR p.title CONTAINS 'cloning' OR p.title CONTAINS 'expression') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly cited molecular biology methodology papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include fundamental methodology papers that have shaped molecular biology research, including molecular cloning techniques, quantitative PCR analysis methods, and research methodologies that are widely used in molecular biology laboratories.

evaluation_questions.question: What cancer epidemiology papers have been published in high-impact medical journals?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name IN ['CA: A Cancer Journal for Clinicians', 'JAMA Oncology', 'Nature Reviews Cancer'] RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: High-impact cancer epidemiology research
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include influential cancer epidemiology papers published in top-tier medical journals, providing comprehensive analyses of global cancer statistics, incidence patterns, and public health implications that guide cancer research and policy worldwide.

evaluation_questions.question: Find computational chemistry and materials science papers with high methodological impact

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 5000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'ab initio' OR p.title CONTAINS 'DFT' OR p.abstract CONTAINS 'computational') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly cited computational chemistry and materials science methodology papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include foundational computational chemistry papers that have revolutionized materials science research, particularly ab initio calculation methods and density functional theory approaches that are widely used for electronic structure calculations.

evaluation_questions.question: What bioinformatics and computational biology tools have been most widely adopted?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 10000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'BLAST' OR p.title CONTAINS 'HTSeq' OR p.abstract CONTAINS 'bioinformatics') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Most cited bioinformatics tools and methods
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include the most widely used bioinformatics tools, including BLAST for sequence alignment and HTSeq for high-throughput sequencing analysis. These tools have become essential components of the computational biology toolkit used by researchers worldwide.

evaluation_questions.question: Find research methodology papers that have shaped evidence-based medicine

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 5000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'PRISMA' OR p.title CONTAINS 'CONSORT' OR p.title CONTAINS 'systematic') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Foundational evidence-based medicine methodology papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include the most influential methodology papers in evidence-based medicine, including the PRISMA guidelines for systematic reviews and CONSORT statement for clinical trials, which have fundamentally improved the quality and transparency of medical research.

evaluation_questions.question: What interdisciplinary papers combine computational methods with experimental biology?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE (p.title CONTAINS 'computational' OR p.title CONTAINS 'analysis') AND (p.title CONTAINS 'experimental' OR p.title CONTAINS 'molecular') RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: Papers that bridge computational and experimental approaches in biology
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include papers that successfully integrate computational and experimental approaches in biology, demonstrating how quantitative analysis methods, sequencing technologies, and molecular techniques work together to advance biological understanding.

evaluation_questions.question: Find highly cited papers that have established foundational techniques across multiple scientific disciplines

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 50000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Most influential cross-disciplinary methodology papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The search results include the most foundational papers across multiple scientific disciplines, including the Lowry protein assay in biochemistry, SDS-PAGE in molecular biology, ResNet in computer vision, and BLAST in bioinformatics. These papers have had transformative impact across their respective fields and beyond.

metadata.description: Mock evaluation data with 75 questions based on enriched OpenAlex academic papers data, designed to test graph-based, semantic search, and parallel hybrid search capabilities. The parallel questions combine semantic concepts with structural constraints to test the effectiveness of hybrid search strategies.
